nasb.text: and all their villages that were around the same cities as far as Baal. These were their settlements, and they have their genealogy.

esv.text: along with all their villages that were around these cities as far as Baal. These were their settlements, and they kept a genealogical record.

cnv.text: 以及這些城周圍所有的村莊，直到巴力。這是他們居住的地方，他們也有自己的族譜。

ccb.text: 以及这些城附近的村庄，远至巴力。这些都是他们的住处。他们有自己的家谱。
